page.title: Medigap (Medicare Supplement) in Vernal, Utah | Vernal Medicare
page.heading: Medigap (Medicare Supplement) — "Don't Be Harold" Insurance
page.description: Compare Medigap plans in Vernal and the Uintah Basin. Local, licensed help choosing a Medicare Supplement that fits your doctors and budget.
page.summary: Medigap (Medicare Supplement) helps pay the costs Original Medicare doesn't — deductibles, copays, and coinsurance. You keep Original Medicare, see any provider who accepts it nationwide, and add a separate Part D plan for prescriptions. Local, licensed help comparing Medigap plans in Vernal and the Uintah Basin.

faqs.question: What is Medigap?
faqs.answer: Medigap (Medicare Supplement) helps pay the costs Original Medicare doesn't, like deductibles, copays, and coinsurance. You keep Original Medicare and can see any provider who accepts Medicare.

faqs.question: Does Medigap include drug coverage?
faqs.answer: No. Most people add a separate Part D plan for prescriptions.

faqs.question: When can I enroll?
faqs.answer: Your best time is the first 6 months you're 65 or older and have Part B—no health questions in most states. After that you can apply anytime, but medical underwriting may apply.
